entry.content:

Really really minor tiny issue. But I noticed that when signing in, the validation error from the email field was showing up in the server field's …

entry.title: lissy93 contributed to panva/jose
entry.content:
lissy93 merged panva/jose#883 · July 23, 2026 06:01
Avoid 32-bit truncation of the AES-CBC-HMAC AAD bit length #883

Just a really small correctness thing. In the AES-CBC-HMAC code, the aad bit length is using << 3. But that gives a wrong answer for larger numbers…

+2 -2
1 comment
